title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Grant "While Using the App" location permission via Find My Device flow after initially denying it, and verify the permission screen disappears.
steps: Start the app with the headset (HS) connected.
Tap 'Don't Allow' on the permission dialog.
Grant 'While Using the App' location permission.
expected: Permission dialogs appear correctly at each step. After granting permission, the Find My Device screen opens without the permission window.
